run.input: counterargument: warning-only stale sessions may be safe

commands: crb topic create "Codex auth boundary" --objective "Track session ownership risk" --json
crb run start topic_codex_auth_boundary --input "counterargument: warning-only stale sessions may be safe" --json
crb graph export topic_codex_auth_boundary --format json --output graph.json
crb graph export topic_codex_auth_boundary --format dot --output graph.dot
crb graph export topic_codex_auth_boundary --format mermaid --output graph.mmd
crb graph view topic_codex_auth_boundary --format html --output graph.html
operator_checks: run status exposes the generated run id and queue state
queue list exposes retryability and human review flags
memory snapshot repeats that graph visualization is not a source of truth
JSON and HTML graph artifacts include the backend authority notice
